title: Our Removals in Sussex: Local Moves Done Right
meta: A close look at how Wolves Removals handles house and business moves across Sussex, from our base near Pulborough to the coast and beyond.
h1: Our Removals in Sussex: How We Move Homes and Businesses Across the County
lead: Sussex is a county of wonderful variety, from the windswept tops of the South Downs to the busy seafronts of the coast, and from quiet Wealden villages to bustling market towns. Moving home or business anywhere within it calls for a removals firm that genuinely knows the terrain, the towns and the quirks of local access. At Wolves Removals we have been doing exactly that since 2016, working out of our base near Pulborough at the heart of the county. This is a closer look at how we approach our removals in Sussex, and why local knowledge makes such a difference.
body:
We are a family-run business, and that shapes everything about how we work. We are not a faceless national chain shuttling crews between regions they barely know; we live and work in Sussex, and the county is our home patch. That familiarity shows in the small things, from knowing which village lanes a large lorry cannot manage to understanding how the coastal roads behave at busy times of day. Over the years we have carried that local knowledge into thousands of moves, and it is one of the main reasons our customers recommend us to their friends and neighbours.

Rooted Near Pulborough, Working Across the County

Our base near Pulborough sits in the Arun valley, roughly central to the spread of Sussex, which makes it an ideal launch point for reaching almost anywhere in the county quickly. From here we travel out daily across West Sussex, East Sussex and well beyond. The villages of the Arun valley and the foot of the Downs are practically our backyard, and we know them intimately, but our reach extends right across the region and onwards into Surrey, Hampshire and Kent, as well as nationwide and into Europe.

Being centrally placed matters more than people sometimes realise. It keeps travel times sensible, helps us schedule efficiently, and means we are rarely far away if a customer needs us. It also gives us a deep, first-hand feel for the different characters of the county's towns and villages, which feeds directly into how we plan each move.

The Many Faces of Sussex Moving

No two corners of Sussex present quite the same challenges, and a good removals firm tailors its approach accordingly. Here is a sense of how the county's variety shapes the work we do.

The Coastal Towns

The string of towns along the Channel coast keeps us busy throughout the year. Seaside living remains hugely popular, and we carry out a great many removals in Worthing, a town that combines a relaxed coastal feel with proper amenities and good schools. Further east, the energy of the city by the sea draws families and professionals alike, and our Brighton removals service is well used to the particular challenges of moving in a busy, built-up seafront city, where parking, narrow streets and flights of stairs all need planning around. Coastal moves often involve tight access and restricted parking, so we plan vehicle size and crew carefully to keep everything running smoothly.

The Market Towns and the Weald

Inland, the picture changes. Market towns such as Horsham offer the best of both worlds, with countryside on the doorstep and fast trains into London, which makes them perennially popular with commuting families. Our Horsham removals team knows the town and its surrounding villages well. The wooded Weald and the villages around it bring their own considerations, from long unmade lanes to properties tucked away at the end of tracks that need the right vehicle to reach.

The Downland Villages

The villages strung along the South Downs are some of the most beautiful places to live in England, but they can be among the trickiest to move in and out of. Narrow lanes, tight gateways, low bridges and limited turning space all demand local knowledge and the right equipment. Being based nearby, we handle plenty of these moves, including frequent removals in Storrington at the foot of the Downs, and we know exactly how to get a loaded vehicle safely down a narrow Downland lane.

The West and the Cathedral City

To the west, the cathedral city and its surrounding villages remain firmly in demand, prized for their history, their harbour and their easy access to both the coast and the countryside. Our Chichester removals service covers the city and the many villages around it. For anyone weighing up where in the county to settle, our broader overview of removals across West Sussex gives a useful sense of the lie of the land, from the coastal plain to the Weald.

What a Move with Us Actually Looks Like

People often ask what to expect when they book a removal, so here is how a typical move with us unfolds. It begins with a conversation, either over the phone or through our quote form, where we get a clear picture of what you are moving, where from and where to, and any access considerations at both ends. From there we provide a free, no-obligation quote tailored to your move rather than a one-size-fits-all package. Our pricing page explains how everything is costed, with man-and-van services starting from £80, so there are no surprises.

In the run-up to moving day, we agree the details, the right vehicle and crew, the timings, and whether you would like us to handle any of the packing. On the day itself, our team arrives on time and works carefully and efficiently to load, transport and unload your belongings, placing boxes in the correct rooms at the new property so you are not left moving everything again. Throughout, your possessions are protected by our liability insurance of up to £10 million, and as a Checkatrade-verified, LAPADA-member firm, we hold ourselves to a high standard at every stage.

The Full Range of Services Under One Roof

One of the advantages of working with an established local firm is that we can handle the whole move, not just the lifting. Our house removals service is the backbone of what we do, but it is far from all we offer. If you would rather not pack, our full packing service wraps and boxes your entire home professionally, and we can supply quality materials from our packing materials range if you prefer to pack yourself.

For belongings that need looking after between properties, or simply more room, our secure storage solutions provide a clean, dry environment and slot neatly into a coordinated move. And because Sussex has more than its share of period homes and collectors, our experience with antiques and fine art runs deep; as a LAPADA member, handling valuable and delicate items is part of our everyday work. For smaller jobs, single items or lighter loads, our flexible man and van service offers an affordable, practical option starting from £80.

Why Local Knowledge Wins

It is worth dwelling on why local expertise matters so much, because it is easy to overlook when comparing quotes. A removals firm that knows Sussex anticipates problems before they arise. We know which roads back up at certain times, which villages have width or weight restrictions, where parking will be a battle, and where a large lorry simply will not fit, so a smaller vehicle and a shuttle approach makes more sense. That foresight means fewer delays, fewer surprises and a calmer day for everyone.

Local knowledge also brings accountability. We rely on our reputation in the communities we serve, which is precisely why so much of our work comes through recommendation. Being Checkatrade-verified means our customers' feedback is there for anyone to see, and we work hard to keep it positive. When you book a genuinely local firm, you are dealing with people who have a stake in getting your move right.

Moving Beyond Sussex

While Sussex is our home, our work is by no means confined to the county. We regularly move customers into and out of neighbouring Surrey, Hampshire and Kent, and we undertake long-distance moves nationwide as well as into Europe. The same care, the same insurance and the same professional standards apply whether we are moving you a couple of miles down the road or several hundred miles across the Channel. Longer moves simply call for a bit more planning, which we are always glad to help with. If you would like to understand more about how we work across the wider county, our companion article on removals in Sussex goes into further detail.

Business and Office Moves Across Sussex

It is not only homes we move. Businesses across the county rely on us to relocate offices, shops and commercial premises with minimal disruption, because every hour of downtime is an hour of lost trade. Commercial moves call for careful planning around the working week, often taking place in the evenings or at weekends so that a business can carry on as normal and reopen in its new home without missing a beat. We coordinate the dismantling and reassembly of office furniture, the careful handling of IT equipment, and the orderly transfer of files and stock, labelling everything so that staff can find their feet quickly at the other end. Whether it is a small office of a few desks or a larger commercial relocation, the same local knowledge that serves our domestic customers, knowing the roads, the access and the parking, keeps business moves running smoothly too.

Caring for Antiques and Period Homes

Sussex is rich in period properties and the kind of homes that have been collecting treasures for generations, and that has shaped our expertise over the years. As a LAPADA member, we are well versed in handling antiques, fine art, pianos, grandfather clocks, chandeliers and the many delicate or valuable pieces that turn up in the county's older homes. These items need more than strong arms; they need the right wrapping, the right lifting techniques and, sometimes, bespoke crating to travel safely. We approach each one individually, assessing how best to protect it before it ever leaves the room. For collectors and those moving an inheritance or a lifetime's accumulation of cherished things, that experience offers real reassurance, and it is one of the qualities our customers most often mention when they recommend us.

What Our Customers Tell Us

We could describe our own work all day, but what matters most is how it feels to be on the receiving end of a move. The themes that come up again and again from the people we help are punctuality, care and friendliness. Customers tell us they appreciate a team that turns up when it said it would, treats their belongings as if they were its own, and keeps a calm, good-humoured atmosphere on what can be a fraught day. Being Checkatrade-verified, our feedback is open for anyone to read, and we work hard to keep earning the recommendations that bring so much of our work. We would always encourage anyone considering a removals firm to look at independent reviews, ask about insurance and accreditation, and choose a company that takes genuine pride in looking after people.

Planning Your Sussex Move

Whether you are moving across the road or across the county, a little preparation makes everything smoother. Start packing early, beginning with the rooms and items you use least, and declutter as you go so you only move what you genuinely want in your new home. Tell us about any access challenges at both properties as early as you can, so we can plan the right vehicle and crew. And keep an essentials box of daily necessities with you in the car rather than on the van. Our collection of moving tips is full of further practical guidance to help you prepare.

We have seen the county change a good deal over the years, with more and more people drawn to Sussex from the cities in search of space, scenery and a slower pace of life. Whatever has brought you to your move, our aim is the same: to make it as smooth, stress-free and friendly as possible, treating your belongings with the care we would want for our own.

Get in Touch

If you are planning a move anywhere in Sussex, or into or out of the county, we would love to help. As a family-run, Checkatrade-verified and LAPADA-member firm with full liability insurance up to £10 million, we bring genuine local knowledge and a real commitment to looking after you. Call the Wolves Removals team on 01903 893731 or request a free, no-obligation quote through our online quote form, and we will tailor everything to your move. From a single van to a full house move with packing and storage, we are here to make moving in Sussex straightforward.
faqs: What areas of Sussex does Wolves Removals cover?

We are based near Pulborough at the heart of the county and cover the whole of West Sussex and East Sussex, including coastal towns such as Worthing and Brighton, market towns like Horsham, the Downland villages around Storrington, and the Chichester area. We also work across Surrey, Hampshire and Kent, as well as nationwide and into Europe.
Why does local knowledge matter when choosing a removals firm?

A firm that knows Sussex anticipates problems before they arise, from village width and weight restrictions to parking battles and lanes a large lorry cannot manage. That foresight means fewer delays and a calmer move. As a Checkatrade-verified local firm, we also rely on our reputation in the communities we serve, which keeps us accountable.
What services do you offer alongside the actual move?

Beyond house removals we offer full and fragile packing, quality packing materials to buy if you prefer to pack yourself, secure storage that slots into a coordinated move, specialist antiques and fine-art handling as a LAPADA member, and a flexible man-and-van service from £80 for smaller jobs and single items.
How much does a removal in Sussex cost?

Costs depend on the size of your move, the distance and any access considerations, so we provide a free, no-obligation quote tailored to your move rather than a fixed package. Man-and-van services start from £80, and our pricing page explains how everything is costed so there are no surprises. Call us on 01903 893731 to discuss your move.
Do you handle moves outside Sussex and abroad?

Yes. While Sussex is our home, we regularly move customers into and out of Surrey, Hampshire and Kent, undertake long-distance moves nationwide, and carry out removals into Europe. The same care, insurance and professional standards apply whether we are moving you a couple of miles or several hundred.
